base_commit_message: rhp: add RHP-013.6 RHPLOAD feedback tree tools
failure_detail: previous RHP-013.7 script wrote newline='\\n' into pathlib.open, causing ValueError illegal newline value
next_recommended_operation: RHP-013.8 loop registry enforcement + transcript-backed resume packet
non_claim_lock: RHP-013.7 V2 adds live RHPLOAD console rendering and JSONL transcript tooling only. It repairs the escaped-newline tooling bug. It does not mutate CI remotely, call providers/models/tools, write CMS or memory, write APIs, perform external ingestion, grant autonomy, or self-authorize.
